# Tax Appeal AI

> Flat-fee property tax appeal toolkit for Illinois homeowners. Compare your assessment to similar homes using public county records and file a county-ready appeal yourself.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Free Fairness Score and property search for Cook County and the Illinois collar counties.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of the appeal process.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Flat $149 Pro Se Toolkit and $399 AI Premium Review.
- [Methodology](/methodology): How comparable properties are selected and scored.
- [Counties](/counties): Coverage for Cook, DuPage, Lake, Will, Kane, and McHenry counties.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about pricing, refunds, deadlines, and scope.
- [About](/about): About Tax Appeal AI.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/signin): Account access for existing customers.
